1	
2	---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_P_Spec ------------------------------
3	
4	EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
5	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
6	
7	AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})
8	
9	AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})
10	
11	AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
12	         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})
13	
14	AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
15	        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)
16	
17	AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
18	        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)
19	
20	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
21	
22	CONSTANT Value
23	
24	Ballot == Nat
25	
26	None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
27	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  
28	
29	CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
30	          FakeAcceptor,   
31	          ByzQuorum,     
32	
33	          WeakQuorum     
34	
35	ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor
36	
37	ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}
38	
39	ASSUME BQA == 
40	          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
41	          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
42	          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
43	          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
44	                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}
45	
46	ASSUME BQLA == 
47	          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
48	          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
49	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
50	
51	1bMessage == 
52	
53	  [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballot, 
54	   mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None},
55	   m2av : SUBSET [val : Value, bal : Ballot],
56	   acc : ByzAcceptor]
57	
58	2avMessage ==
59	
60	   [type : {"2av"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value, acc : ByzAcceptor]
61	
62	2bMessage == [type : {"2b"}, acc : ByzAcceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
63	
64	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
65	
66	VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs
67	
68	sentMsgs(type, bal) == {m \in bmsgs: m.type = type /\ m.bal = bal}
69	
70	KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
71	  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
72	  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
73	           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
74	                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
75	      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
76	           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
77	                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
78	                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
79	                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
80	           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
81	                \A a \in WQ :
82	                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
83	                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
84	                                                    /\ r.val = v
85	
86	vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs >>
87	
88	Init == 
89	        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
90	        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
91	        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
92	        /\ 2avSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
93	        /\ knowsSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
94	        /\ bmsgs = {}
95	
96	acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
97	                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
98	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
99	                       /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type  |-> "1b", bal |-> b, acc |-> self,
100	                                                 m2av |-> 2avSent[self],
101	                                                 mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
102	                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
103	                    \/ /\ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
104	                          /\ \A r \in 2avSent[self] : r.bal < b
105	                       /\ \E m \in {ms \in sentMsgs("1c", b) : KnowsSafeAt(self, b, ms.val)}:
106	                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
107	                                          {[type |-> "2av", bal |-> b, val |-> m.val, acc |-> self]})
108	                            /\ 2avSent' = [2avSent EXCEPT ![self] = {r \in 2avSent[self] : r.val # m.val}
109	                                                                      \cup {[val |-> m.val, bal |-> b]}]
110	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
111	                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, knowsSent>>
112	                    \/ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
113	                       /\ \E v \in {vv \in Value :
114	                                      \E Q \in ByzQuorum :
115	                                         \A aa \in Q :
116	                                            \E m \in sentMsgs("2av", b) : /\ m.val = vv
117	                                                                          /\ m.acc = aa}:
118	                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
119	                                          {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b, val |-> v]})
120	                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = v]
121	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
122	                       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
123	                       /\ UNCHANGED <<2avSent, knowsSent>>
124	                    \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET sentMsgs("1b", b):
125	                            knowsSent' = [knowsSent EXCEPT ![self] = knowsSent[self] \cup S]
126	                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, bmsgs>>
127	
128	leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
129	                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
130	                           bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup S)
131	                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent >>
132	
133	facceptor(self) == /\ \E m \in { mm \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
134	                                 mm.acc = self}:
135	                        bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {m})
136	                   /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, 
137	                                   knowsSent >>
138	
139	Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
140	           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
141	           \/ (\E self \in FakeAcceptor: facceptor(self))
142	
143	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
144	
145	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
146	
147	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
148	
149	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
150	
151	Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}
152	
153	msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }
154	
155	acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
156	 
157	1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
158	                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]
159	
160	1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }
161	
162	1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
163	                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
164	
165	2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
166	             \E Q \in Quorum :
167	               \A a \in Q :
168	                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
169	                    /\ m2av.acc = a
170	                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
171	                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }
172	
173	msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
174	         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
175	
176	MaxBallot(S) ==  
177	  IF S = {} THEN -1
178	            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x
179	
180	AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
181	        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
182	          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x
183	
184	1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}
185	
186	PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
187	              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
188	                                           ma.acc = a}})]
189	
190	P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
191	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
192	
193	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
194	
195	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
196	
197	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
198	
199	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
200	
201	THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
202	PROOF OBVIOUS
203	
204	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
205	
206	==============================================================================
207	
208

file.content:
---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_P_Spec ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})

AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})

AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value

Ballot == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  

CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
          FakeAcceptor,   
          ByzQuorum,     

          WeakQuorum     

ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}

ASSUME BQA == 
          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}

ASSUME BQLA == 
          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

1bMessage == 

  [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballot, 
   mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None},
   m2av : SUBSET [val : Value, bal : Ballot],
   acc : ByzAcceptor]

2avMessage ==

   [type : {"2av"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value, acc : ByzAcceptor]

2bMessage == [type : {"2b"}, acc : ByzAcceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs

sentMsgs(type, bal) == {m \in bmsgs: m.type = type /\ m.bal = bal}

KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
                \A a \in WQ :
                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
                                                    /\ r.val = v

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs >>

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ 2avSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ knowsSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ bmsgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type  |-> "1b", bal |-> b, acc |-> self,
                                                 m2av |-> 2avSent[self],
                                                 mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                          /\ \A r \in 2avSent[self] : r.bal < b
                       /\ \E m \in {ms \in sentMsgs("1c", b) : KnowsSafeAt(self, b, ms.val)}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2av", bal |-> b, val |-> m.val, acc |-> self]})
                            /\ 2avSent' = [2avSent EXCEPT ![self] = {r \in 2avSent[self] : r.val # m.val}
                                                                      \cup {[val |-> m.val, bal |-> b]}]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                       /\ \E v \in {vv \in Value :
                                      \E Q \in ByzQuorum :
                                         \A aa \in Q :
                                            \E m \in sentMsgs("2av", b) : /\ m.val = vv
                                                                          /\ m.acc = aa}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b, val |-> v]})
                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = v]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET sentMsgs("1b", b):
                            knowsSent' = [knowsSent EXCEPT ![self] = knowsSent[self] \cup S]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, bmsgs>>

leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                           bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup S)
                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent >>

facceptor(self) == /\ \E m \in { mm \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                                 mm.acc = self}:
                        bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {m})
                   /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, 
                                   knowsSent >>

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
           \/ (\E self \in FakeAcceptor: facceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}

msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }

acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
 
1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]

1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }

1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}

2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
             \E Q \in Quorum :
               \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }

msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")

MaxBallot(S) ==  
  IF S = {} THEN -1
            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}

PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
                                           ma.acc = a}})]

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

==============================================================================

content.content:
1	---------------------------- MODULE PConProof -------------------------------
2	
3	EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS
4	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5	
6	CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum
7	
8	ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
9	             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {} 
10	                                                                     
11	Ballot ==  Nat
12	
13	ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap Acceptor = {}
14	
15	None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
16	
17	Message ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballot]
18	           \cup [type : {"1b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, 
19	                 mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None}]
20	           \cup [type : {"1c"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
21	           \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
22	           \cup [type : {"2b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
23	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	
25	VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs
26	
27	sentMsgs(t, b) == {m \in msgs : (m.type = t) /\ (m.bal = b)}
28	
29	ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
30	  LET Q1b == {m \in sentMsgs("1b", b) : m.acc \in Q}
31	  IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m.acc = a
32	      /\ \/ \A m \in Q1b : m.mbal = -1
33	         \/ \E m1c \in msgs :
34	              /\ m1c = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> m1c.bal, val |-> v]
35	              /\ \A m \in Q1b : /\ m1c.bal \geq m.mbal
36	                                /\ (m1c.bal = m.mbal) => (m.mval = v)
37	
38	vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs >>
39	
40	ProcSet == (Acceptor) \cup (Ballot)
41	
42	Init == 
43	        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
44	        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
45	        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
46	        /\ msgs = {}
47	
48	acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
49	                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
50	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
51	                       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
52	                                               mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
53	                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
54	                    \/ /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
55	                       /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
56	                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
57	                            /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
58	                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
59	                            /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
60	                                                       bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})
61	
62	leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
63	                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET Value:
64	                           /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
65	                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
66	                   \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
67	                           /\ /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
68	                              /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
69	                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
70	                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
71	
72	Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
73	           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
74	
75	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
76	
77	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
78	
79	Phase1a(self) ==
80	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
81	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
82	
83	Phase1c(self, S) ==
84	  /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
85	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
86	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
87	
88	Phase2a(self, v) ==
89	  /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
90	  /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
91	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
92	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
93	
94	Phase1b(self, b) ==
95	  /\ b > maxBal[self]
96	  /\ sentMsgs("1a", b) # {}
97	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
98	  /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
99	                         mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]}
100	  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
101	
102	Phase2b(self, b) ==
103	  /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
104	  /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
105	       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
106	       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
107	       /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
108	       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
109	                               bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})
110	
111	TLANext ==
112	  \/ \E self \in Acceptor : 
113	        \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1b(self, b) 
114	                          \/ Phase2b(self,b) 
115	  \/ \E self \in Ballot :
116	        \/ Phase1a(self)
117	        \/ \E S \in SUBSET Value : Phase1c(self, S)
118	        \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(self, v)
119	
120	THEOREM NextDef == (Next <=> TLANext) 
121	  PROOF OMITTED
122	
123	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
124	
125	TypeOK == /\ maxBal  \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
126	          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
127	          /\ maxVVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
128	          /\ msgs \subseteq Message    
129	
130	chosen == {v \in Value : \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
131	                           \A a \in Q : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
132	                                                        /\ m.acc  = a
133	                                                        /\ m.bal  = b
134	                                                        /\ m.val  = v} 
135	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
136	
137	votes == [a \in Acceptor |->  
138	           {<<m.bal, m.val>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm.type = "2b"
139	                                                   /\ mm.acc = a }}]
140	
141	V == INSTANCE VoteProof 
142	
143	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
144	
145	PAccInv == \A a \in Acceptor : 
146	             /\ maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]
147	             /\ \A b \in (maxVBal[a]+1)..(maxBal[a]-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(a,b)
148	             /\ (maxVBal[a] # -1) => V!VotedFor(a, maxVBal[a], maxVVal[a])
149	             
150	P1bInv == \A m \in msgs :
151	             (m.type = "1b") => 
152	               /\ (maxBal[m.acc] >= m.bal) /\ (m.bal > m.mbal)
153	               /\ \A b \in (m.mbal+1)..(m.bal-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(m.acc,b)
154	
155	P1cInv ==  \A m \in msgs : (m.type = "1c") => V!SafeAt(m.bal, m.val)
156	
157	P2aInv == \A m \in msgs : 
158	            (m.type = "2a") => \E m1c \in msgs : /\ m1c.type = "1c"
159	                                                 /\ m1c.bal = m.bal 
160	                                                 /\ m1c.val = m.val
161	
162	THEOREM PT1 == TypeOK /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv =>
163	                 \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
164	                     ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => V!SafeAt(b, v) 
165	  PROOF OMITTED
166	
167	PInv == TypeOK /\ PAccInv /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv /\ P2aInv  
168	
169	THEOREM Invariance == Spec => []PInv
170	  PROOF OMITTED
171	
172	THEOREM Implementation == Spec => V!Spec
173	  PROOF OMITTED
174	
175	THEOREM Spec => [](chosen = V!chosen)
176	  PROOF OMITTED
177	
178	=============================================================================
179	
180

---------------------------- MODULE PConProof -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {} 
                                                                     
Ballot ==  Nat

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap Acceptor = {}

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value

Message ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballot]
           \cup [type : {"1b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, 
                 mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None}]
           \cup [type : {"1c"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
           \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
           \cup [type : {"2b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs

sentMsgs(t, b) == {m \in msgs : (m.type = t) /\ (m.bal = b)}

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  LET Q1b == {m \in sentMsgs("1b", b) : m.acc \in Q}
  IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m.acc = a
      /\ \/ \A m \in Q1b : m.mbal = -1
         \/ \E m1c \in msgs :
              /\ m1c = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> m1c.bal, val |-> v]
              /\ \A m \in Q1b : /\ m1c.bal \geq m.mbal
                                /\ (m1c.bal = m.mbal) => (m.mval = v)

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs >>

ProcSet == (Acceptor) \cup (Ballot)

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ msgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
                                               mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
                    \/ /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
                       /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                            /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
                            /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
                                                       bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})

leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET Value:
                           /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
                   \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                           /\ /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
                              /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Phase1a(self) ==
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase1c(self, S) ==
  /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase2a(self, v) ==
  /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
  /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase1b(self, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ sentMsgs("1a", b) # {}
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
                         mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>

Phase2b(self, b) ==
  /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
  /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
       /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
                               bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})

TLANext ==
  \/ \E self \in Acceptor : 
        \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1b(self, b) 
                          \/ Phase2b(self,b) 
  \/ \E self \in Ballot :
        \/ Phase1a(self)
        \/ \E S \in SUBSET Value : Phase1c(self, S)
        \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(self, v)

THEOREM NextDef == (Next <=> TLANext) 
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ maxBal  \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
          /\ msgs \subseteq Message    

chosen == {v \in Value : \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
                           \A a \in Q : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                                        /\ m.acc  = a
                                                        /\ m.bal  = b
                                                        /\ m.val  = v} 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

votes == [a \in Acceptor |->  
           {<<m.bal, m.val>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm.type = "2b"
                                                   /\ mm.acc = a }}]

V == INSTANCE VoteProof 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

PAccInv == \A a \in Acceptor : 
             /\ maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]
             /\ \A b \in (maxVBal[a]+1)..(maxBal[a]-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(a,b)
             /\ (maxVBal[a] # -1) => V!VotedFor(a, maxVBal[a], maxVVal[a])
             
P1bInv == \A m \in msgs :
             (m.type = "1b") => 
               /\ (maxBal[m.acc] >= m.bal) /\ (m.bal > m.mbal)
               /\ \A b \in (m.mbal+1)..(m.bal-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(m.acc,b)

P1cInv ==  \A m \in msgs : (m.type = "1c") => V!SafeAt(m.bal, m.val)

P2aInv == \A m \in msgs : 
            (m.type = "2a") => \E m1c \in msgs : /\ m1c.type = "1c"
                                                 /\ m1c.bal = m.bal 
                                                 /\ m1c.val = m.val

THEOREM PT1 == TypeOK /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv =>
                 \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
                     ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => V!SafeAt(b, v) 
  PROOF OMITTED

PInv == TypeOK /\ PAccInv /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv /\ P2aInv  

THEOREM Invariance == Spec => []PInv
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM Implementation == Spec => V!Spec
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM Spec => [](chosen = V!chosen)
  PROOF OMITTED

=============================================================================

1	----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof ------------------------------ 
2	
3	EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS
4	
5	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
6	CONSTANT Value,     
7	         Acceptor,  
8	         Quorum     
9	
10	ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
11	             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
12	 
13	THEOREM QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
14	  PROOF OMITTED
15	
16	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
17	
18	Ballot == Nat
19	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
20	
21	VARIABLES votes, maxBal
22	
23	VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]
24	
25	DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)
26	
27	SafeAt(b, v) ==
28	  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
29	        \/ bb = 0
30	        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
31	             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
32	             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
33	                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
34	                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
35	                                      \A w \in Value :
36	                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
37	                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
38	  IN  SA[b]
39	
40	vars == << votes, maxBal >>
41	
42	ProcSet == (Acceptor)
43	
44	Init == 
45	        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
46	        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
47	
48	acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
49	                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
50	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
51	                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
52	                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
53	                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
54	                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
55	                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
56	                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
57	                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
58	                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
59	                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
60	
61	Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
62	
63	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
64	
65	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
66	
67	THEOREM RecursiveFcnOfNat ==
68	          ASSUME NEW Def(_,_), 
69	                 \A n \in Nat : 
70	                    \A g, h : (\A i \in 0..(n-1) : g[i] = h[i]) => (Def(g, n) = Def(h, n))
71	          PROVE  LET f[n \in Nat] == Def(f, n)
72	                 IN  f = [n \in Nat |-> Def(f, n)]
73	PROOF OMITTED
74	
75	THEOREM SafeAtProp ==
76	  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
77	    SafeAt(b, v) =
78	      \/ b = 0
79	      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
80	           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
81	           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
82	                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
83	                               /\ \A a \in Q :
84	                                    \A w \in Value :
85	                                        VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
86	                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
87	  PROOF OMITTED
88	
89	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
90	
91	TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
92	          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
93	
94	ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)
95	
96	chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
97	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
98	
99	AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
100	                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
101	                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]
102	
103	THEOREM GeneralNatInduction == 
104	         \A f : /\ f[0]
105	                /\ \A n \in Nat : (\A j \in 0..n : f[j]) => f[n+1]
106	                => \A n \in Nat : f[n]
107	  PROOF OMITTED
108	
109	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
110	
111	LEMMA SafeLemma == 
112	       TypeOK => 
113	         \A b \in Ballot :
114	           \A v \in Value :
115	              SafeAt(b, v) => 
116	                \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
117	                  \E Q \in Quorum :
118	                    \A a \in Q : /\ maxBal[a] >= c
119	                                 /\ \/ DidNotVoteIn(a, c)
120	                                    \/ VotedFor(a, c, v)
121	  PROOF OMITTED
122	
123	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
124	
125	VInv1 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v, w \in Value : 
126	           VotedFor(a, b, v) /\ VotedFor(a, b, w) => (v = w)
127	
128	VInv2 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
129	                  VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)
130	
131	VInv3 ==  \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value : 
132	                VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)
133	
134	THEOREM VInv3 => VInv1
135	  PROOF OMITTED
136	
137	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
138	
139	LEMMA VT0 == /\ TypeOK
140	             /\ VInv1
141	             /\ VInv2
142	             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
143	                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v) /\ ChosenIn(c, w) => (v = w)
144	  PROOF OMITTED
145	
146	THEOREM VT1 == /\ TypeOK 
147	               /\ VInv1
148	               /\ VInv2
149	               => \A v, w : 
150	                    (v \in chosen) /\ (w \in chosen) => (v = w)
151	  PROOF OMITTED
152	
153	THEOREM SafeAtPropPrime ==
154	  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
155	    SafeAt(b, v)' =
156	      \/ b = 0
157	      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
158	           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal'[a] \geq b
159	           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
160	                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)'
161	                               /\ \A a \in Q :
162	                                    \A w \in Value :
163	                                        VotedFor(a, c, w)' => (w = v)
164	                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)'
165	PROOF OMITTED
166	
167	LEMMA VT0Prime ==
168	             /\ TypeOK'
169	             /\ VInv1'
170	             /\ VInv2'
171	             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
172	                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v)' /\ ChosenIn(c, w)' => (v = w)
173	  PROOF OMITTED
174	
175	THEOREM VT1Prime == 
176	               /\ TypeOK' 
177	               /\ VInv1'
178	               /\ VInv2'
179	               => \A v, w : 
180	                    (v \in chosen') /\ (w \in chosen') => (v = w)
181	  PROOF OMITTED
182	
183	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
184	
185	VInv4 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
186	            maxBal[a] < b => DidNotVoteIn(a, b)
187	
188	VInv == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3 /\ VInv4
189	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
190	
191	IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
192	  /\ b > maxBal[self]
193	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
194	  /\ UNCHANGED votes
195	
196	VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
197	  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
198	  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
199	  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
200	        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
201	  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
202	  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
203	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
204	
205	BallotAction(self, b) ==
206	  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
207	  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)
208	
209	ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}
210	
211	LEMMA NextDef ==
212	  TypeOK => 
213	   (Next =  \E self \in Acceptor :
214	                 \E b \in Ballot : BallotAction(self, b) )
215	  PROOF OMITTED
216	
217	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
218	
219	THEOREM InductiveInvariance == VInv /\ [Next]_vars => VInv'
220	  PROOF OMITTED
221	
222	THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
223	  PROOF OMITTED
224	
225	THEOREM VT2 == Spec => []VInv
226	  PROOF OMITTED
227	
228	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
229	
230	C == INSTANCE Consensus 
231	
232	THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec 
233	  PROOF OMITTED
234	
235	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
236	
237	ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)
238	
239	ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
240	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
241	
242	AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
243	        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)
244	
245	AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
246	        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
247	          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x
248	
249	AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
250	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
251	
252	THEOREM VT4 == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3  =>
253	                \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
254	                   (\A a \in Q : (maxBal[a] >= b)) => \E v \in Value : SafeAt(b,v)
255	
256	  PROOF OMITTED
257	
258	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
259	
260	LiveAssumption ==
261	  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
262	     \A self \in Q :
263	       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
264	       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
265	     
266	LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  
267	
268	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
269	
270	WellFounded(S, LT) == ~ \E f \in [Nat -> S] : 
271	                           \A i \in Nat : <<f[i+1], f[i]>> \in LT
272	
273	ProperSubsetRel(S) == 
274	  {r \in (SUBSET S) \X (SUBSET S) : /\ r[1] \subseteq r[2]
275	                                    /\ r[1] # r[2] }     
276	                                                     
277	THEOREM SubsetWellFounded ==
278	           \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => WellFounded(SUBSET S, ProperSubsetRel(S))
279	PROOF OMITTED
280	
281	THEOREM LatticeRule ==  ASSUME NEW S, NEW LT, WellFounded(S, LT),
282	                               NEW TEMPORAL P(_), NEW TEMPORAL Q
283	                        PROVE  /\ Q \/ (\E i \in S : P(i))
284	                               /\ \A i \in S : 
285	                                     P(i) ~> (Q \/ \E j \in S : (<<j, i>> \in LT) /\ P(j))
286	                               => ((\E i \in S : P(i)) ~> Q)
287	PROOF OMITTED
288	
289	THEOREM AlwaysForall ==
290	           ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
291	           PROVE  (\A s \in S : []P(s)) <=> [](\A s \in S : P(s))
292	  PROOF OMITTED
293	
294	LEMMA EventuallyAlwaysForall == 
295	        ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, IsFiniteSet(S),
296	               NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
297	        PROVE  (\A s \in S : <>[]P(s)) => <>[](\A s \in S : P(s))
298	
299	PROOF OMITTED
300	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
301	
302	THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
303	  PROOF OMITTED
304	
305	===============================================================================
306	
307

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof ------------------------------ 

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
THEOREM QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

ProcSet == (Acceptor)

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM RecursiveFcnOfNat ==
          ASSUME NEW Def(_,_), 
                 \A n \in Nat : 
                    \A g, h : (\A i \in 0..(n-1) : g[i] = h[i]) => (Def(g, n) = Def(h, n))
          PROVE  LET f[n \in Nat] == Def(f, n)
                 IN  f = [n \in Nat |-> Def(f, n)]
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SafeAtProp ==
  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
    SafeAt(b, v) =
      \/ b = 0
      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                               /\ \A a \in Q :
                                    \A w \in Value :
                                        VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

THEOREM GeneralNatInduction == 
         \A f : /\ f[0]
                /\ \A n \in Nat : (\A j \in 0..n : f[j]) => f[n+1]
                => \A n \in Nat : f[n]
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA SafeLemma == 
       TypeOK => 
         \A b \in Ballot :
           \A v \in Value :
              SafeAt(b, v) => 
                \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
                  \E Q \in Quorum :
                    \A a \in Q : /\ maxBal[a] >= c
                                 /\ \/ DidNotVoteIn(a, c)
                                    \/ VotedFor(a, c, v)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VInv1 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v, w \in Value : 
           VotedFor(a, b, v) /\ VotedFor(a, b, w) => (v = w)

VInv2 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
                  VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

VInv3 ==  \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value : 
                VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

THEOREM VInv3 => VInv1
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA VT0 == /\ TypeOK
             /\ VInv1
             /\ VInv2
             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v) /\ ChosenIn(c, w) => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT1 == /\ TypeOK 
               /\ VInv1
               /\ VInv2
               => \A v, w : 
                    (v \in chosen) /\ (w \in chosen) => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SafeAtPropPrime ==
  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
    SafeAt(b, v)' =
      \/ b = 0
      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal'[a] \geq b
           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)'
                               /\ \A a \in Q :
                                    \A w \in Value :
                                        VotedFor(a, c, w)' => (w = v)
                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)'
PROOF OMITTED

LEMMA VT0Prime ==
             /\ TypeOK'
             /\ VInv1'
             /\ VInv2'
             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v)' /\ ChosenIn(c, w)' => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT1Prime == 
               /\ TypeOK' 
               /\ VInv1'
               /\ VInv2'
               => \A v, w : 
                    (v \in chosen') /\ (w \in chosen') => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VInv4 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
            maxBal[a] < b => DidNotVoteIn(a, b)

VInv == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3 /\ VInv4
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

LEMMA NextDef ==
  TypeOK => 
   (Next =  \E self \in Acceptor :
                 \E b \in Ballot : BallotAction(self, b) )
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM InductiveInvariance == VInv /\ [Next]_vars => VInv'
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT2 == Spec => []VInv
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec 
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM VT4 == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3  =>
                \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
                   (\A a \in Q : (maxBal[a] >= b)) => \E v \in Value : SafeAt(b,v)

  PROOF OMITTED

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

WellFounded(S, LT) == ~ \E f \in [Nat -> S] : 
                           \A i \in Nat : <<f[i+1], f[i]>> \in LT

ProperSubsetRel(S) == 
  {r \in (SUBSET S) \X (SUBSET S) : /\ r[1] \subseteq r[2]
                                    /\ r[1] # r[2] }     
                                                     
THEOREM SubsetWellFounded ==
           \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => WellFounded(SUBSET S, ProperSubsetRel(S))
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM LatticeRule ==  ASSUME NEW S, NEW LT, WellFounded(S, LT),
                               NEW TEMPORAL P(_), NEW TEMPORAL Q
                        PROVE  /\ Q \/ (\E i \in S : P(i))
                               /\ \A i \in S : 
                                     P(i) ~> (Q \/ \E j \in S : (<<j, i>> \in LT) /\ P(j))
                               => ((\E i \in S : P(i)) ~> Q)
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM AlwaysForall ==
           ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
           PROVE  (\A s \in S : []P(s)) <=> [](\A s \in S : P(s))
  PROOF OMITTED

LEMMA EventuallyAlwaysForall == 
        ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, IsFiniteSet(S),
               NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
        PROVE  (\A s \in S : <>[]P(s)) => <>[](\A s \in S : P(s))

PROOF OMITTED
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OMITTED

===============================================================================

file.content:
----------------------------- MODULE Consensus ------------------------------ 

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLAPS

CONSTANT Value  

VARIABLE chosen

vars == << chosen >>

Init == 
        /\ chosen = {}

Next == /\ chosen = {}
        /\ \E v \in Value:
             chosen' = {v}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ chosen \subseteq Value
          /\ IsFiniteSet(chosen) 

Inv == /\ TypeOK
       /\ Cardinality(chosen) \leq 1

AXIOM EmptySetCardinality == IsFiniteSet({}) /\ Cardinality({}) = 0
AXIOM SingletonCardinality == 
          \A e : IsFiniteSet({e}) /\ (Cardinality({e}) = 1)

SingleCardinalityTest == 
  \A e \in SUBSET {"a", "b", "c"} : IsFiniteSet({e}) /\ (Cardinality({e}) = 1)

LEMMA InductiveInvariance ==
           Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv'
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM Invariance == Spec => []Inv 
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveSpec == Spec /\ WF_vars(Next)
Success == <>(chosen # {})

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}

LEMMA EnabledDef ==
        TypeOK => 
          ((ENABLED <<Next>>_vars) <=> (chosen = {}))
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM LiveSpec => Success
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM LiveSpecEquals ==
          LiveSpec <=> Spec /\ ([]<><<Next>>_vars \/ []<>(chosen # {}))
  PROOF OMITTED

=============================================================================

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA MaxBallotEmpty == MaxBallot({}) = -1
  BY DEF MaxBallot

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW Q \in Quorum
               PROVE  Q # {}
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. PICK S \in ByzQuorum : Q = S \cap Acceptor
    BY DEF Quorum
  <1>2. S \cap S \cap Acceptor # {}
    BY BQA, <1>1
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>2, <1>1

LEMMA QuorumSubsetAcceptor == \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
  BY DEF Quorum
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA InitImpliesPInit == Init => P!Init
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init
               PROVE  P!Init
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. bmsgs = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <1>2. 1bOr2bMsgs = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>3. \A a \in Acceptor : {m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}} = {}
    BY <1>2
  <1>4. PmaxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
    BY <1>3, MaxBallotEmpty DEF PmaxBal
  <1>5. msgsOfType("1a") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1c") = {}
        /\ msgsOfType("2av") = {} /\ msgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") = {}
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType
  <1>7. 1bmsgs = {}
    BY <1>6 DEF 1bmsgs
  <1>8. 1cmsgs = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF 1cmsgs
  <1>9. 2amsgs = {}
    <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value],
                          m \in 2amsgs
                   PROVE  FALSE
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") :
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>3. PICK a \in Q : TRUE
      BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <2>4. \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : m2av.acc = a
      BY <2>2, <2>3
    <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>10. msgs = {}
    BY <1>5, <1>7, <1>8, <1>9, <1>6 DEF msgs
  <1>11. QED
    BY <1>4, <1>10 DEF P!Init, Init

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_P_Spec ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})

AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})

AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value

Ballot == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  

CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
          FakeAcceptor,   
          ByzQuorum,     

          WeakQuorum     

ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}

ASSUME BQA == 
          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}

ASSUME BQLA == 
          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

1bMessage == 

  [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballot, 
   mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None},
   m2av : SUBSET [val : Value, bal : Ballot],
   acc : ByzAcceptor]

2avMessage ==

   [type : {"2av"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value, acc : ByzAcceptor]

2bMessage == [type : {"2b"}, acc : ByzAcceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs

sentMsgs(type, bal) == {m \in bmsgs: m.type = type /\ m.bal = bal}

KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
                \A a \in WQ :
                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
                                                    /\ r.val = v

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs >>

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ 2avSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ knowsSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ bmsgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type  |-> "1b", bal |-> b, acc |-> self,
                                                 m2av |-> 2avSent[self],
                                                 mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                          /\ \A r \in 2avSent[self] : r.bal < b
                       /\ \E m \in {ms \in sentMsgs("1c", b) : KnowsSafeAt(self, b, ms.val)}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2av", bal |-> b, val |-> m.val, acc |-> self]})
                            /\ 2avSent' = [2avSent EXCEPT ![self] = {r \in 2avSent[self] : r.val # m.val}
                                                                      \cup {[val |-> m.val, bal |-> b]}]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                       /\ \E v \in {vv \in Value :
                                      \E Q \in ByzQuorum :
                                         \A aa \in Q :
                                            \E m \in sentMsgs("2av", b) : /\ m.val = vv
                                                                          /\ m.acc = aa}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b, val |-> v]})
                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = v]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET sentMsgs("1b", b):
                            knowsSent' = [knowsSent EXCEPT ![self] = knowsSent[self] \cup S]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, bmsgs>>

leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                           bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup S)
                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent >>

facceptor(self) == /\ \E m \in { mm \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                                 mm.acc = self}:
                        bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {m})
                   /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, 
                                   knowsSent >>

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
           \/ (\E self \in FakeAcceptor: facceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}

msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }

acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
 
1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]

1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }

1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}

2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
             \E Q \in Quorum :
               \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }

msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")

MaxBallot(S) ==  
  IF S = {} THEN -1
            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}

PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
                                           ma.acc = a}})]

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

==============================================================================

---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_P_Spec ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})

AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})

AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value

Ballot == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  

CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
          FakeAcceptor,   
          ByzQuorum,     

          WeakQuorum     

ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}

ASSUME BQA == 
          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}

ASSUME BQLA == 
          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

1bMessage == 

  [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballot, 
   mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None},
   m2av : SUBSET [val : Value, bal : Ballot],
   acc : ByzAcceptor]

2avMessage ==

   [type : {"2av"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value, acc : ByzAcceptor]

2bMessage == [type : {"2b"}, acc : ByzAcceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs

sentMsgs(type, bal) == {m \in bmsgs: m.type = type /\ m.bal = bal}

KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
                \A a \in WQ :
                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
                                                    /\ r.val = v

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs >>

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ 2avSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ knowsSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ bmsgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type  |-> "1b", bal |-> b, acc |-> self,
                                                 m2av |-> 2avSent[self],
                                                 mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                          /\ \A r \in 2avSent[self] : r.bal < b
                       /\ \E m \in {ms \in sentMsgs("1c", b) : KnowsSafeAt(self, b, ms.val)}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2av", bal |-> b, val |-> m.val, acc |-> self]})
                            /\ 2avSent' = [2avSent EXCEPT ![self] = {r \in 2avSent[self] : r.val # m.val}
                                                                      \cup {[val |-> m.val, bal |-> b]}]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                       /\ \E v \in {vv \in Value :
                                      \E Q \in ByzQuorum :
                                         \A aa \in Q :
                                            \E m \in sentMsgs("2av", b) : /\ m.val = vv
                                                                          /\ m.acc = aa}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b, val |-> v]})
                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = v]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET sentMsgs("1b", b):
                            knowsSent' = [knowsSent EXCEPT ![self] = knowsSent[self] \cup S]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, bmsgs>>

leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                           bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup S)
                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent >>

facceptor(self) == /\ \E m \in { mm \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                                 mm.acc = self}:
                        bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {m})
                   /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, 
                                   knowsSent >>

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
           \/ (\E self \in FakeAcceptor: facceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}

msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }

acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
 
1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]

1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }

1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}

2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
             \E Q \in Quorum :
               \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }

msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")

MaxBallot(S) ==  
  IF S = {} THEN -1
            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}

PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
                                           ma.acc = a}})]

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA MaxBallotEmpty == MaxBallot({}) = -1
  BY DEF MaxBallot

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW Q \in Quorum
               PROVE  Q # {}
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. PICK S \in ByzQuorum : Q = S \cap Acceptor
    BY DEF Quorum
  <1>2. S \cap S \cap Acceptor # {}
    BY BQA, <1>1
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>2, <1>1

LEMMA QuorumSubsetAcceptor == \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
  BY DEF Quorum
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA InitImpliesPInit == Init => P!Init
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init
               PROVE  P!Init
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. bmsgs = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <1>2. 1bOr2bMsgs = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>3. \A a \in Acceptor : {m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}} = {}
    BY <1>2
  <1>4. PmaxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
    BY <1>3, MaxBallotEmpty DEF PmaxBal
  <1>5. msgsOfType("1a") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1c") = {}
        /\ msgsOfType("2av") = {} /\ msgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") = {}
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType
  <1>7. 1bmsgs = {}
    BY <1>6 DEF 1bmsgs
  <1>8. 1cmsgs = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF 1cmsgs
  <1>9. 2amsgs = {}
    <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value],
                          m \in 2amsgs
                   PROVE  FALSE
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") :
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>3. PICK a \in Q : TRUE
      BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <2>4. \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : m2av.acc = a
      BY <2>2, <2>3
    <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>10. msgs = {}
    BY <1>5, <1>7, <1>8, <1>9, <1>6 DEF msgs
  <1>11. QED
    BY <1>4, <1>10 DEF P!Init, Init

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

==============================================================================
