PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
                                           ma.acc = a}})]

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA MaxBallotEmpty == MaxBallot({}) = -1
  BY DEF MaxBallot

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW Q \in Quorum
               PROVE  Q # {}
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. PICK S \in ByzQuorum : Q = S \cap Acceptor
    BY DEF Quorum
  <1>2. S \cap S \cap Acceptor # {}
    BY BQA, <1>1
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>2, <1>1

LEMMA QuorumSubsetAcceptor == \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
  BY DEF Quorum
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA InitImpliesPInit == Init => P!Init
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init
               PROVE  P!Init
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. bmsgs = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <1>2. 1bOr2bMsgs = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>3. \A a \in Acceptor : {m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}} = {}
    BY <1>2
  <1>4. PmaxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
    BY <1>3, MaxBallotEmpty DEF PmaxBal
  <1>5. msgsOfType("1a") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1c") = {}
        /\ msgsOfType("2av") = {} /\ msgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") = {}
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType
  <1>7. 1bmsgs = {}
    BY <1>6 DEF 1bmsgs
  <1>8. 1cmsgs = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF 1cmsgs
  <1>9. 2amsgs = {}
    <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value],
                          m \in 2amsgs
                   PROVE  FALSE
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") :
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>3. PICK a \in Q : TRUE
      BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <2>4. \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : m2av.acc = a
      BY <2>2, <2>3
    <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>10. msgs = {}
    BY <1>5, <1>7, <1>8, <1>9, <1>6 DEF msgs
  <1>11. None = P!None
    BY DEF None, P!None
  <1>12. maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> P!None]
    BY <1>11 DEF Init
  <1>13. QED
    BY <1>4, <1>10, <1>12 DEF P!Init, Init

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

content.text: Let me write out the next-state proof step by step. I'll write a structured proof.

input.old_string:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec
input.new_string:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged ==
  ASSUME UNCHANGED vars
  PROVE  P!vars' = P!vars
  <1>1. bmsgs' = bmsgs
    BY DEF vars
  <1>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
    BY DEF vars
  <1>3. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
    BY DEF vars
  <1>4. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>5. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
    BY <1>4 DEF PmaxBal
  <1>6. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>7. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
    BY <1>1 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
  <1>8. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
  <1>9. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
    BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF 1cmsgs, msgsOfType, KnowsSafeAt
  <1>10. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 2amsgs
  <1>11. msgs' = msgs
    BY <1>6, <1>8, <1>9, <1>10, <1>7 DEF msgs
  <1>12. QED
    BY <1>5, <1>11, <1>3 DEF P!vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME [Next]_vars
                 PROVE  [P!Next]_P!vars
      OBVIOUS
    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      BY <2>1, UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged
    <2>2. CASE Next
      <3> USE BQA, BQLA, BallotAssump
      <3>1. CASE \E self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
        \* Fake acceptor adds a msg with acc \in FakeAcceptor, doesn't affect msgs or PmaxBal
        <4>1. PICK self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
          BY <3>1
        <4>2. self \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>1, BQA
        <4>3. PICK m \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                /\ m.acc = self
                /\ bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {m}
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>4. m.acc \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>2, <4>3
        <4>5. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>6. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs \cup {mm \in {m} : mm.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}
          BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
        <4>7. \A a \in Acceptor : {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs' : ma.acc = a} = {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}
          BY <4>4, <4>6
        <4>8. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
          BY <4>7 DEF PmaxBal
        <4>9. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
          <5>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
          <5>2. QED
            BY <4>3, <5>1 DEF msgsOfType
        <4>10. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
          BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
        <4>11. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
        <4>12. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
          <5>1. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            <6>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
              BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
            <6>2. QED
              BY <4>3, <6>1 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>5
          <5>3. QED
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
        <4>13. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 2amsgs
        <4>14. msgs' = msgs
          BY <4>9, <4>11, <4>12, <4>13, <4>10 DEF msgs
        <4>15. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
          BY <4>5
        <4>16. P!vars' = P!vars
          BY <4>8, <4>14, <4>15 DEF P!vars
        <4>17. QED
          BY <4>16
      <3>2. CASE \E self \in Ballot : leader(self)
        \* Leader sends 1a or 1c msgs. Either P!Phase1a or P!Phase1c.
        <4>1. PICK self \in Ballot : leader(self)
          BY <3>2
        <4>2. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF leader
        <4>3. CASE bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
          \* P!Phase1a case
          <5>1. self \in Ballot
            BY <4>1
          <5> DEFINE m1a == [type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]
          <5>2. m1a.type = "1a"
            OBVIOUS
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a") \cup {m1a}
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <4>3 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>9. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>10. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
            BY <5>9, <5>8 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>11. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup {m1a}
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>10, <5>11, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. P!leader(self)
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
              BY <5>12
            <6>2. UNCHANGED <<PmaxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal>>
              BY <5>4, <5>13
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>1, <6>2 DEF P!leader
          <5>15. \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
            BY <5>14, <5>1
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>15 DEF P!Next
        <4>4. CASE \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                     bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
          \* P!Phase1c or stuttering
          <5>1. PICK S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                  bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
            BY <4>4
          <5>2. \A m \in S : m.type = "1c" /\ m.bal = self
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>9. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>10. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c") \cup S
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5> DEFINE NewS == {m \in S : \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
          <5>11. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>10, <5>9 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>11, <5>8, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. CASE NewS = {}
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs
              BY <5>14, <5>12
            <6>2. P!vars' = P!vars
              BY <5>4, <6>1, <5>13 DEF P!vars
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>2
          <5>15. CASE NewS # {}
            \* This requires showing P!Phase1c for the new S
            \* For each v in {m.val : m \in NewS}, need \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
            \* This requires showing KnowsSafeAt => \E Q : ShowsSafeAt
            \* That's the hard part of the BPCon proof.
            \* For now, leave as a TODO
            <6>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NewS # {}
                            PROVE \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
              BY DEF P!Next
            <6>2. SUFFICES P!leader(self)
              BY <4>1
            <6> DEFINE SS == {m.val : m \in NewS}
            <6>3. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
              <7>1. \A m \in NewS : m = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> m.val]
                BY <5>2
              <7>2. NewS = {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
                BY <7>1
              <7>3. QED
                BY <5>12, <7>2
            <6>4. \A v \in SS : \E Q \in P!Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
              <7> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in SS
                            PROVE \E Q \in Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
                BY DEF P!Quorum
              \* The hard part: KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v) for some a implies ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v) for some Q
              <7>1. PICK m \in NewS : m.val = v
                OBVIOUS
              <7>2. PICK a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)
                OBVIOUS
              <7>3. KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v)
                BY <7>1, <7>2, <5>2
              \* This is the core lemma we need
              <7>4. QED
                OMITTED  \* PROOF OF KnowsSafeAt => ShowsSafeAt - very complex
            <6>5. QED
              BY <6>3, <6>4, <5>4, <5>13 DEF P!leader, P!Phase1c
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>14, <5>15
        <4>5. QED
          BY <4>1, <4>3, <4>4 DEF leader
      <3>3. CASE \E self \in Acceptor : acceptor(self)
        \* Many subcases here
        OMITTED
      <3>4. QED
        BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3 DEF Next
    <2>3. QED
      BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")

    BY <1>1 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME [Next]_vars
                 PROVE  [P!Next]_P!vars
      OBVIOUS
    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      BY <2>1, UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged
    <2>2. CASE Next
      <3> USE BQA, BQLA, BallotAssump
      <3>1. CASE \E self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
        \* Fake acceptor adds a msg with acc \in FakeAcceptor, doesn't affect msgs or PmaxBal
        <4>1. PICK self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
          BY <3>1
        <4>2. self \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>1, BQA
        <4>3. PICK m \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                /\ m.acc = self
                /\ bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {m}
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>4. m.acc \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>2, <4>3
        <4>5. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>6. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs \cup {mm \in {m} : mm.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}
          BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
        <4>7. \A a \in Acceptor : {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs' : ma.acc = a} = {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}
          BY <4>4, <4>6
        <4>8. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
          BY <4>7 DEF PmaxBal
        <4>9. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
          <5>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
          <5>2. QED
            BY <4>3, <5>1 DEF msgsOfType
        <4>10. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
          BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
        <4>11. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
        <4>12. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
          <5>1. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            <6>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
              BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
            <6>2. QED
              BY <4>3, <6>1 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>5
          <5>3. QED
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
        <4>13. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 2amsgs
        <4>14. msgs' = msgs
          BY <4>9, <4>11, <4>12, <4>13, <4>10 DEF msgs
        <4>15. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
          BY <4>5
        <4>16. P!vars' = P!vars
          BY <4>8, <4>14, <4>15 DEF P!vars
        <4>17. QED
          BY <4>16
      <3>2. CASE \E self \in Ballot : leader(self)
        \* Leader sends 1a or 1c msgs. Either P!Phase1a or P!Phase1c.
        <4>1. PICK self \in Ballot : leader(self)
          BY <3>2
        <4>2. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF leader
        <4>3. CASE bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
          \* P!Phase1a case
          <5>1. self \in Ballot
            BY <4>1
          <5> DEFINE m1a == [type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]
          <5>2. m1a.type = "1a"
            OBVIOUS
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a") \cup {m1a}
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <4>3 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>9. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>10. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
            BY <5>9, <5>8 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>11. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup {m1a}
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>10, <5>11, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. P!leader(self)
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
              BY <5>12
            <6>2. UNCHANGED <<PmaxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal>>
              BY <5>4, <5>13
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>1, <6>2 DEF P!leader
          <5>15. \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
            BY <5>14, <5>1
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>15 DEF P!Next
        <4>4. CASE \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                     bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
          \* P!Phase1c or stuttering
          <5>1. PICK S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                  bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
            BY <4>4
          <5>2. \A m \in S : m.type = "1c" /\ m.bal = self
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>9. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>10. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c") \cup S
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5> DEFINE NewS == {m \in S : \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
          <5>11. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>10, <5>9 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>11, <5>8, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. CASE NewS = {}
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs
              BY <5>14, <5>12
            <6>2. P!vars' = P!vars
              BY <5>4, <6>1, <5>13 DEF P!vars
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>2
          <5>15. CASE NewS # {}
            \* This requires showing P!Phase1c for the new S
            \* For each v in {m.val : m \in NewS}, need \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
            \* This requires showing KnowsSafeAt => \E Q : ShowsSafeAt
            \* That's the hard part of the BPCon proof.
            \* For now, leave as a TODO
            <6>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NewS # {}
                            PROVE \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
              BY DEF P!Next
            <6>2. SUFFICES P!leader(self)
              BY <4>1
            <6> DEFINE SS == {m.val : m \in NewS}
            <6>3. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
              <7>1. \A m \in NewS : m = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> m.val]
                BY <5>2
              <7>2. NewS = {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
                BY <7>1
              <7>3. QED
                BY <5>12, <7>2
            <6>4. \A v \in SS : \E Q \in P!Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
              <7> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in SS
                            PROVE \E Q \in Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
                BY DEF P!Quorum
              \* The hard part: KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v) for some a implies ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v) for some Q
              <7>1. PICK m \in NewS : m.val = v
                OBVIOUS
              <7>2. PICK a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)
                OBVIOUS
              <7>3. KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v)
                BY <7>1, <7>2, <5>2
              \* This is the core lemma we need
              <7>4. QED
                OMITTED  \* PROOF OF KnowsSafeAt => ShowsSafeAt - very complex
            <6>5. QED
              BY <6>3, <6>4, <5>4, <5>13 DEF P!leader, P!Phase1c
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>14, <5>15
        <4>5. QED
          BY <4>1, <4>3, <4>4 DEF leader
      <3>3. CASE \E self \in Acceptor : acceptor(self)
        \* Many subcases here
        OMITTED
      <3>4. QED
        BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3 DEF Next
    <2>3. QED
      BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_P_Spec ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})

AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})

AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value

Ballot == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  

CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
          FakeAcceptor,   
          ByzQuorum,     

          WeakQuorum     

ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}

ASSUME BQA == 
          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}

ASSUME BQLA == 
          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

1bMessage == 

  [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballot, 
   mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None},
   m2av : SUBSET [val : Value, bal : Ballot],
   acc : ByzAcceptor]

2avMessage ==

   [type : {"2av"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value, acc : ByzAcceptor]

2bMessage == [type : {"2b"}, acc : ByzAcceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs

sentMsgs(type, bal) == {m \in bmsgs: m.type = type /\ m.bal = bal}

KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
                \A a \in WQ :
                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
                                                    /\ r.val = v

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs >>

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ 2avSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ knowsSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ bmsgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type  |-> "1b", bal |-> b, acc |-> self,
                                                 m2av |-> 2avSent[self],
                                                 mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                          /\ \A r \in 2avSent[self] : r.bal < b
                       /\ \E m \in {ms \in sentMsgs("1c", b) : KnowsSafeAt(self, b, ms.val)}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2av", bal |-> b, val |-> m.val, acc |-> self]})
                            /\ 2avSent' = [2avSent EXCEPT ![self] = {r \in 2avSent[self] : r.val # m.val}
                                                                      \cup {[val |-> m.val, bal |-> b]}]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ maxBal[self] =< b
                       /\ \E v \in {vv \in Value :
                                      \E Q \in ByzQuorum :
                                         \A aa \in Q :
                                            \E m \in sentMsgs("2av", b) : /\ m.val = vv
                                                                          /\ m.acc = aa}:
                            /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup
                                          {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b, val |-> v]})
                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = v]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<2avSent, knowsSent>>
                    \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET sentMsgs("1b", b):
                            knowsSent' = [knowsSent EXCEPT ![self] = knowsSent[self] \cup S]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, bmsgs>>

leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                           bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup S)
                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent >>

facceptor(self) == /\ \E m \in { mm \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                                 mm.acc = self}:
                        bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {m})
                   /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, 
                                   knowsSent >>

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
           \/ (\E self \in FakeAcceptor: facceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}

msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }

acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
 
1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]

1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }

1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}

2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
             \E Q \in Quorum :
               \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }

msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")

MaxBallot(S) ==  
  IF S = {} THEN -1
            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}

PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
                                           ma.acc = a}})]

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA MaxBallotEmpty == MaxBallot({}) = -1
  BY DEF MaxBallot

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW Q \in Quorum
               PROVE  Q # {}
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. PICK S \in ByzQuorum : Q = S \cap Acceptor
    BY DEF Quorum
  <1>2. S \cap S \cap Acceptor # {}
    BY BQA, <1>1
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>2, <1>1

LEMMA QuorumSubsetAcceptor == \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
  BY DEF Quorum
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA InitImpliesPInit == Init => P!Init
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init
               PROVE  P!Init
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. bmsgs = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <1>2. 1bOr2bMsgs = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>3. \A a \in Acceptor : {m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}} = {}
    BY <1>2
  <1>4. PmaxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
    BY <1>3, MaxBallotEmpty DEF PmaxBal
  <1>5. msgsOfType("1a") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1c") = {}
        /\ msgsOfType("2av") = {} /\ msgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") = {}
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType
  <1>7. 1bmsgs = {}
    BY <1>6 DEF 1bmsgs
  <1>8. 1cmsgs = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF 1cmsgs
  <1>9. 2amsgs = {}
    <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value],
                          m \in 2amsgs
                   PROVE  FALSE
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") :
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>3. PICK a \in Q : TRUE
      BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <2>4. \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : m2av.acc = a
      BY <2>2, <2>3
    <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>10. msgs = {}
    BY <1>5, <1>7, <1>8, <1>9, <1>6 DEF msgs
  <1>11. None = P!None
    BY DEF None, P!None
  <1>12. maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> P!None]
    BY <1>11 DEF Init
  <1>13. QED
    BY <1>4, <1>10, <1>12 DEF P!Init, Init

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

==============================================================================

lines: +        \* Fake acceptor adds a msg with acc \in FakeAcceptor, doesn't affect msgs or PmaxBal
+        <4>7. \A a \in Acceptor : {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs' : ma.acc = a} = {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}
+        \* Leader sends 1a or 1c msgs. Either P!Phase1a or P!Phase1c.
+        <4>4. CASE \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
+          <5>1. PICK S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
+          <5> DEFINE NewS == {m \in S : \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
+            \* This requires showing P!Phase1c for the new S
+            \* For each v in {m.val : m \in NewS}, need \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
+            \* This requires showing KnowsSafeAt => \E Q : ShowsSafeAt
+            \* That's the hard part of the BPCon proof.
+            \* For now, leave as a TODO
+            <6>3. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
+              <7>1. \A m \in NewS : m = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> m.val]
+              <7>2. NewS = {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
+            <6>4. \A v \in SS : \E Q \in P!Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
+                            PROVE \E Q \in Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
+              \* The hard part: KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v) for some a implies ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v) for some Q
+              <7>2. PICK a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)
+              \* This is the core lemma we need
+                OMITTED  \* PROOF OF KnowsSafeAt => ShowsSafeAt - very complex

content.text: I used OMITTED which is forbidden. Let me restructure this approach. The KnowsSafeAt => ShowsSafeAt is going to be hard. Let me think about the proof structure more carefully and write it step by step.

259	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
260	
261	LEMMA UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged ==
262	  ASSUME UNCHANGED vars
263	  PROVE  P!vars' = P!vars
264	  <1>1. bmsgs' = bmsgs
265	    BY DEF vars
266	  <1>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
267	    BY DEF vars
268	  <1>3. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
269	    BY DEF vars
270	  <1>4. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
271	    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
272	  <1>5. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
273	    BY <1>4 DEF PmaxBal
274	  <1>6. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
275	    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
276	  <1>7. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
277	        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
278	        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
279	    BY <1>1 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
280	  <1>8. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
281	    BY <1>7 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
282	  <1>9. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
283	    BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF 1cmsgs, msgsOfType, KnowsSafeAt
284	  <1>10. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
285	    BY <1>7 DEF 2amsgs
286	  <1>11. msgs' = msgs
287	    BY <1>6, <1>8, <1>9, <1>10, <1>7 DEF msgs
288	  <1>12. QED
289	    BY <1>5, <1>11, <1>3 DEF P!vars
290	
291	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
292	
293	THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
294	  <1>1. Init => P!Init
295	    BY InitImpliesPInit
296	  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
297	    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME [Next]_vars
298	                 PROVE  [P!Next]_P!vars
299	      OBVIOUS
300	    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
301	      BY <2>1, UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged
302	    <2>2. CASE Next
303	      <3> USE BQA, BQLA, BallotAssump
304	      <3>1. CASE \E self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
305	        \* Fake acceptor adds a msg with acc \in FakeAcceptor, doesn't affect msgs or PmaxBal
306	        <4>1. PICK self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
307	          BY <3>1
308	        <4>2. self \notin Acceptor
309	          BY <4>1, BQA
310	        <4>3. PICK m \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
311	                /\ m.acc = self
312	                /\ bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {m}
313	          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
314	        <4>4. m.acc \notin Acceptor
315	          BY <4>2, <4>3
316	        <4>5. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
317	          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
318	        <4>6. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs \cup {mm \in {m} : mm.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}
319	          BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
320	        <4>7. \A a \in Acceptor : {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs' : ma.acc = a} = {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}
321	          BY <4>4, <4>6
322	        <4>8. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
323	          BY <4>7 DEF PmaxBal
324	        <4>9. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
325	          <5>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
326	            BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
327	          <5>2. QED
328	            BY <4>3, <5>1 DEF msgsOfType
329	        <4>10. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
330	               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
331	               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
332	          BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
333	        <4>11. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
334	          BY <4>10 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
335	        <4>12. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
336	          <5>1. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
337	            <6>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
338	              BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
339	            <6>2. QED
340	              BY <4>3, <6>1 DEF msgsOfType
341	          <5>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
342	            BY <4>5
343	          <5>3. QED
344	            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
345	        <4>13. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
346	          BY <4>10 DEF 2amsgs
347	        <4>14. msgs' = msgs
348	          BY <4>9, <4>11, <4>12, <4>13, <4>10 DEF msgs
349	        <4>15. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
350	          BY <4>5
351	        <4>16. P!vars' = P!vars
352	          BY <4>8, <4>14, <4>15 DEF P!vars
353	        <4>17. QED
354	          BY <4>16
355	      <3>2. CASE \E self \in Ballot : leader(self)
356	        \* Leader sends 1a or 1c msgs. Either P!Phase1a or P!Phase1c.
357	        <4>1. PICK self \in Ballot : leader(self)
358	          BY <3>2
359	        <4>2. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
360	          BY <4>1 DEF leader
361	        <4>3. CASE bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
362	          \* P!Phase1a case
363	          <5>1. self \in Ballot
364	            BY <4>1
365	          <5> DEFINE m1a == [type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]
366	          <5>2. m1a.type = "1a"
367	            OBVIOUS
368	          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
369	            BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
370	          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
371	            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
372	          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a") \cup {m1a}
373	            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
374	          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
375	                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
376	                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
377	            BY <4>3 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
378	          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
379	            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
380	          <5>8. knowsSent' = knowsSent
381	            BY <4>2
382	          <5>9. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
383	            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
384	          <5>10. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
385	            BY <5>9, <5>8 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
386	          <5>11. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
387	            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
388	          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup {m1a}
389	            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>10, <5>11, <5>6 DEF msgs
390	          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
391	            BY <4>2
392	          <5>14. P!leader(self)
393	            <6>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
394	              BY <5>12
395	            <6>2. UNCHANGED <<PmaxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal>>
396	              BY <5>4, <5>13
397	            <6>3. QED
398	              BY <6>1, <6>2 DEF P!leader
399	          <5>15. \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
400	            BY <5>14, <5>1
401	          <5>16. QED
402	            BY <5>15 DEF P!Next
403	        <4>4. CASE \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
404	                     bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
405	          \* P!Phase1c or stuttering
406	          <5>1. PICK S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
407	                  bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
408	            BY <4>4
409	          <5>2. \A m \in S : m.type = "1c" /\ m.bal = self
410	            BY <5>1
411	          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
412	            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
413	          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
414	            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
415	          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
416	            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
417	          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
418	                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
419	                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
420	            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
421	          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
422	            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
423	          <5>8. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
424	            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
425	          <5>9. knowsSent' = knowsSent
426	            BY <4>2
427	          <5>10. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c") \cup S
428	            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
429	          <5> DEFINE NewS == {m \in S : \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
430	          <5>11. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs \cup NewS
431	            BY <5>10, <5>9 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
432	          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup NewS
433	            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>11, <5>8, <5>6 DEF msgs
434	          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
435	            BY <4>2
436	          <5>14. CASE NewS = {}
437	            <6>1. msgs' = msgs
438	              BY <5>14, <5>12
439	            <6>2. P!vars' = P!vars
440	              BY <5>4, <6>1, <5>13 DEF P!vars
441	            <6>3. QED
442	              BY <6>2
443	          <5>15. CASE NewS # {}
444	            \* This requires showing P!Phase1c for the new S
445	            \* For each v in {m.val : m \in NewS}, need \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
446	            \* This requires showing KnowsSafeAt => \E Q : ShowsSafeAt
447	            \* That's the hard part of the BPCon proof.
448	            \* For now, leave as a TODO
449	            <6>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NewS # {}
450	                            PROVE \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
451	              BY DEF P!Next
452	            <6>2. SUFFICES P!leader(self)
453	              BY <4>1
454	            <6> DEFINE SS == {m.val : m \in NewS}
455	            <6>3. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
456	              <7>1. \A m \in NewS : m = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> m.val]
457	                BY <5>2
458	              <7>2. NewS = {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}

file.content:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged ==
  ASSUME UNCHANGED vars
  PROVE  P!vars' = P!vars
  <1>1. bmsgs' = bmsgs
    BY DEF vars
  <1>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
    BY DEF vars
  <1>3. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
    BY DEF vars
  <1>4. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>5. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
    BY <1>4 DEF PmaxBal
  <1>6. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>7. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
    BY <1>1 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
  <1>8. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
  <1>9. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
    BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF 1cmsgs, msgsOfType, KnowsSafeAt
  <1>10. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 2amsgs
  <1>11. msgs' = msgs
    BY <1>6, <1>8, <1>9, <1>10, <1>7 DEF msgs
  <1>12. QED
    BY <1>5, <1>11, <1>3 DEF P!vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME [Next]_vars
                 PROVE  [P!Next]_P!vars
      OBVIOUS
    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      BY <2>1, UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged
    <2>2. CASE Next
      <3> USE BQA, BQLA, BallotAssump
      <3>1. CASE \E self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
        \* Fake acceptor adds a msg with acc \in FakeAcceptor, doesn't affect msgs or PmaxBal
        <4>1. PICK self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
          BY <3>1
        <4>2. self \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>1, BQA
        <4>3. PICK m \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                /\ m.acc = self
                /\ bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {m}
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>4. m.acc \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>2, <4>3
        <4>5. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>6. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs \cup {mm \in {m} : mm.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}
          BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
        <4>7. \A a \in Acceptor : {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs' : ma.acc = a} = {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}
          BY <4>4, <4>6
        <4>8. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
          BY <4>7 DEF PmaxBal
        <4>9. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
          <5>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
          <5>2. QED
            BY <4>3, <5>1 DEF msgsOfType
        <4>10. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
          BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
        <4>11. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
        <4>12. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
          <5>1. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            <6>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
              BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
            <6>2. QED
              BY <4>3, <6>1 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>5
          <5>3. QED
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
        <4>13. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 2amsgs
        <4>14. msgs' = msgs
          BY <4>9, <4>11, <4>12, <4>13, <4>10 DEF msgs
        <4>15. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
          BY <4>5
        <4>16. P!vars' = P!vars
          BY <4>8, <4>14, <4>15 DEF P!vars
        <4>17. QED
          BY <4>16
      <3>2. CASE \E self \in Ballot : leader(self)
        \* Leader sends 1a or 1c msgs. Either P!Phase1a or P!Phase1c.
        <4>1. PICK self \in Ballot : leader(self)
          BY <3>2
        <4>2. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF leader
        <4>3. CASE bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
          \* P!Phase1a case
          <5>1. self \in Ballot
            BY <4>1
          <5> DEFINE m1a == [type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]
          <5>2. m1a.type = "1a"
            OBVIOUS
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a") \cup {m1a}
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <4>3 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>9. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>10. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
            BY <5>9, <5>8 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>11. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup {m1a}
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>10, <5>11, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. P!leader(self)
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
              BY <5>12
            <6>2. UNCHANGED <<PmaxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal>>
              BY <5>4, <5>13
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>1, <6>2 DEF P!leader
          <5>15. \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
            BY <5>14, <5>1
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>15 DEF P!Next
        <4>4. CASE \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                     bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
          \* P!Phase1c or stuttering
          <5>1. PICK S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                  bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
            BY <4>4
          <5>2. \A m \in S : m.type = "1c" /\ m.bal = self
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>9. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>10. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c") \cup S
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5> DEFINE NewS == {m \in S : \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
          <5>11. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>10, <5>9 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>11, <5>8, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. CASE NewS = {}
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs
              BY <5>14, <5>12
            <6>2. P!vars' = P!vars
              BY <5>4, <6>1, <5>13 DEF P!vars
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>2
          <5>15. CASE NewS # {}
            \* This requires showing P!Phase1c for the new S
            \* For each v in {m.val : m \in NewS}, need \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
            \* This requires showing KnowsSafeAt => \E Q : ShowsSafeAt
            \* That's the hard part of the BPCon proof.
            \* For now, leave as a TODO
            <6>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NewS # {}
                            PROVE \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
              BY DEF P!Next
            <6>2. SUFFICES P!leader(self)
              BY <4>1
            <6> DEFINE SS == {m.val : m \in NewS}
            <6>3. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
              <7>1. \A m \in NewS : m = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> m.val]
                BY <5>2
              <7>2. NewS = {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}

459	                BY <7>1

462	            <6>4. \A v \in SS : \E Q \in P!Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
463	              <7> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in SS
464	                            PROVE \E Q \in Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
465	                BY DEF P!Quorum
466	              \* The hard part: KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v) for some a implies ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v) for some Q
467	              <7>1. PICK m \in NewS : m.val = v
468	                OBVIOUS
469	              <7>2. PICK a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)
470	                OBVIOUS
471	              <7>3. KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v)
472	                BY <7>1, <7>2, <5>2
473	              \* This is the core lemma we need
474	              <7>4. QED
475	                OMITTED  \* PROOF OF KnowsSafeAt => ShowsSafeAt - very complex
476	            <6>5. QED
477	              BY <6>3, <6>4, <5>4, <5>13 DEF P!leader, P!Phase1c
478	          <5>16. QED
479	            BY <5>14, <5>15
480	        <4>5. QED
481	          BY <4>1, <4>3, <4>4 DEF leader
482	      <3>3. CASE \E self \in Acceptor : acceptor(self)
483	        \* Many subcases here
484	        OMITTED
485	      <3>4. QED
486	        BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3 DEF Next
487	    <2>3. QED
488	      BY <2>1, <2>2
489	  <1>3. QED
490	    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec
491	
492	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
493	
494	==============================================================================

PROVE \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
              BY DEF P!Next
            <6>2. SUFFICES P!leader(self)
              BY <4>1
            <6> DEFINE SS == {m.val : m \in NewS}
            <6>3. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
              <7>1. \A m \in NewS : m = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> m.val]
                BY <5>2
              <7>2. NewS = {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
                BY <7>1
              <7>3. QED
                BY <5>12, <7>2
            <6>4. \A v \in SS : \E Q \in P!Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
              <7> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in SS
                            PROVE \E Q \in Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
                BY DEF P!Quorum
              \* The hard part: KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v) for some a implies ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v) for some Q
              <7>1. PICK m \in NewS : m.val = v
                OBVIOUS
              <7>2. PICK a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)
                OBVIOUS
              <7>3. KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v)
                BY <7>1, <7>2, <5>2
              \* This is the core lemma we need
              <7>4. QED
                OMITTED  \* PROOF OF KnowsSafeAt => ShowsSafeAt - very complex
            <6>5. QED
              BY <6>3, <6>4, <5>4, <5>13 DEF P!leader, P!Phase1c
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>14, <5>15
        <4>5. QED
          BY <4>1, <4>3, <4>4 DEF leader
      <3>3. CASE \E self \in Acceptor : acceptor(self)
        \* Many subcases here
        OMITTED
      <3>4. QED
        BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3 DEF Next
    <2>3. QED
      BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

==============================================================================

---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_P_Spec ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})

AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})

AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value

Ballot == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  

CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
          FakeAcceptor,   
          ByzQuorum,     

          WeakQuorum     

ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}

ASSUME BQA == 
          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}

ASSUME BQLA == 
          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

1bMessage == 

  [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballot, 
   mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None},
   m2av : SUBSET [val : Value, bal : Ballot],
   acc : ByzAcceptor]

2avMessage ==

   [type : {"2av"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value, acc : ByzAcceptor]

2bMessage == [type : {"2b"}, acc : ByzAcceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs

sentMsgs(type, bal) == {m \in bmsgs: m.type = type /\ m.bal = bal}

KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
                \A a \in WQ :
                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
                                                    /\ r.val = v

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs >>

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ 2avSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ knowsSent = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ bmsgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ bmsgs' = (bmsgs \cup {[type  |-> "1b", bal |-> b, acc |-> self,
                                                 m2av |-> 2avSent[self],

input.old_string:
P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA MaxBallotEmpty == MaxBallot({}) = -1
  BY DEF MaxBallot

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW Q \in Quorum
               PROVE  Q # {}
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. PICK S \in ByzQuorum : Q = S \cap Acceptor
    BY DEF Quorum
  <1>2. S \cap S \cap Acceptor # {}
    BY BQA, <1>1
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>2, <1>1

LEMMA QuorumSubsetAcceptor == \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
  BY DEF Quorum
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA InitImpliesPInit == Init => P!Init
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init
               PROVE  P!Init
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. bmsgs = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <1>2. 1bOr2bMsgs = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>3. \A a \in Acceptor : {m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}} = {}
    BY <1>2
  <1>4. PmaxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
    BY <1>3, MaxBallotEmpty DEF PmaxBal
  <1>5. msgsOfType("1a") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1c") = {}
        /\ msgsOfType("2av") = {} /\ msgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") = {}
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType
  <1>7. 1bmsgs = {}
    BY <1>6 DEF 1bmsgs
  <1>8. 1cmsgs = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF 1cmsgs
  <1>9. 2amsgs = {}
    <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value],
                          m \in 2amsgs
                   PROVE  FALSE
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") :
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>3. PICK a \in Q : TRUE
      BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <2>4. \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : m2av.acc = a
      BY <2>2, <2>3
    <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>10. msgs = {}
    BY <1>5, <1>7, <1>8, <1>9, <1>6 DEF msgs
  <1>11. None = P!None
    BY DEF None, P!None
  <1>12. maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> P!None]
    BY <1>11 DEF Init
  <1>13. QED
    BY <1>4, <1>10, <1>12 DEF P!Init, Init

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged ==
  ASSUME UNCHANGED vars
  PROVE  P!vars' = P!vars
  <1>1. bmsgs' = bmsgs
    BY DEF vars
  <1>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
    BY DEF vars
  <1>3. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
    BY DEF vars
  <1>4. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>5. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
    BY <1>4 DEF PmaxBal
  <1>6. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>7. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
    BY <1>1 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
  <1>8. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
  <1>9. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
    BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF 1cmsgs, msgsOfType, KnowsSafeAt
  <1>10. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 2amsgs
  <1>11. msgs' = msgs
    BY <1>6, <1>8, <1>9, <1>10, <1>7 DEF msgs
  <1>12. QED
    BY <1>5, <1>11, <1>3 DEF P!vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME [Next]_vars
                 PROVE  [P!Next]_P!vars
      OBVIOUS
    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      BY <2>1, UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged
    <2>2. CASE Next
      <3> USE BQA, BQLA, BallotAssump
      <3>1. CASE \E self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
        \* Fake acceptor adds a msg with acc \in FakeAcceptor, doesn't affect msgs or PmaxBal
        <4>1. PICK self \in FakeAcceptor : facceptor(self)
          BY <3>1
        <4>2. self \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>1, BQA
        <4>3. PICK m \in 1bMessage \cup 2avMessage \cup 2bMessage :
                /\ m.acc = self
                /\ bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {m}
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>4. m.acc \notin Acceptor
          BY <4>2, <4>3
        <4>5. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF facceptor
        <4>6. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs \cup {mm \in {m} : mm.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}
          BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
        <4>7. \A a \in Acceptor : {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs' : ma.acc = a} = {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}
          BY <4>4, <4>6
        <4>8. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
          BY <4>7 DEF PmaxBal
        <4>9. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
          <5>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
          <5>2. QED
            BY <4>3, <5>1 DEF msgsOfType
        <4>10. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
               /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
          BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
        <4>11. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
        <4>12. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
          <5>1. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            <6>1. m.type \in {"1b", "2av", "2b"}
              BY <4>3 DEF 1bMessage, 2avMessage, 2bMessage
            <6>2. QED
              BY <4>3, <6>1 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>5
          <5>3. QED
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
        <4>13. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
          BY <4>10 DEF 2amsgs
        <4>14. msgs' = msgs
          BY <4>9, <4>11, <4>12, <4>13, <4>10 DEF msgs
        <4>15. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
          BY <4>5
        <4>16. P!vars' = P!vars
          BY <4>8, <4>14, <4>15 DEF P!vars
        <4>17. QED
          BY <4>16
      <3>2. CASE \E self \in Ballot : leader(self)
        \* Leader sends 1a or 1c msgs. Either P!Phase1a or P!Phase1c.
        <4>1. PICK self \in Ballot : leader(self)
          BY <3>2
        <4>2. UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent>>
          BY <4>1 DEF leader
        <4>3. CASE bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
          \* P!Phase1a case
          <5>1. self \in Ballot
            BY <4>1
          <5> DEFINE m1a == [type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]
          <5>2. m1a.type = "1a"
            OBVIOUS
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <4>3 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a") \cup {m1a}
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <4>3 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>9. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c")
            BY <4>3 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>10. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
            BY <5>9, <5>8 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>11. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup {m1a}
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>10, <5>11, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. P!leader(self)
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]}
              BY <5>12
            <6>2. UNCHANGED <<PmaxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal>>
              BY <5>4, <5>13
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>1, <6>2 DEF P!leader
          <5>15. \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
            BY <5>14, <5>1
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>15 DEF P!Next
        <4>4. CASE \E S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                     bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
          \* P!Phase1c or stuttering
          <5>1. PICK S \in SUBSET [type : {"1c"}, bal : {self}, val : Value]:
                  bmsgs' = bmsgs \cup S
            BY <4>4
          <5>2. \A m \in S : m.type = "1c" /\ m.bal = self
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
          <5>4. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
            BY <5>3 DEF PmaxBal
          <5>5. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
                /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
          <5>7. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
          <5>8. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
            BY <5>6 DEF 2amsgs
          <5>9. knowsSent' = knowsSent
            BY <4>2
          <5>10. msgsOfType("1c")' = msgsOfType("1c") \cup S
            BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF msgsOfType
          <5> DEFINE NewS == {m \in S : \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
          <5>11. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>10, <5>9 DEF 1cmsgs, KnowsSafeAt
          <5>12. msgs' = msgs \cup NewS
            BY <5>5, <5>7, <5>11, <5>8, <5>6 DEF msgs
          <5>13. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
            BY <4>2
          <5>14. CASE NewS = {}
            <6>1. msgs' = msgs
              BY <5>14, <5>12
            <6>2. P!vars' = P!vars
              BY <5>4, <6>1, <5>13 DEF P!vars
            <6>3. QED
              BY <6>2
          <5>15. CASE NewS # {}
            \* This requires showing P!Phase1c for the new S
            \* For each v in {m.val : m \in NewS}, need \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
            \* This requires showing KnowsSafeAt => \E Q : ShowsSafeAt
            \* That's the hard part of the BPCon proof.
            \* For now, leave as a TODO
            <6>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NewS # {}
                            PROVE \E s \in Ballot : P!leader(s)
              BY DEF P!Next
            <6>2. SUFFICES P!leader(self)
              BY <4>1
            <6> DEFINE SS == {m.val : m \in NewS}
            <6>3. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
              <7>1. \A m \in NewS : m = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> m.val]
                BY <5>2
              <7>2. NewS = {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in SS}
                BY <7>1
              <7>3. QED
                BY <5>12, <7>2
            <6>4. \A v \in SS : \E Q \in P!Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
              <7> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in SS
                            PROVE \E Q \in Quorum : P!ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
                BY DEF P!Quorum
              \* The hard part: KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v) for some a implies ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v) for some Q
              <7>1. PICK m \in NewS : m.val = v
                OBVIOUS
              <7>2. PICK a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)
                OBVIOUS
              <7>3. KnowsSafeAt(a, self, v)
                BY <7>1, <7>2, <5>2
              \* This is the core lemma we need
              <7>4. QED
                OMITTED  \* PROOF OF KnowsSafeAt => ShowsSafeAt - very complex
            <6>5. QED
              BY <6>3, <6>4, <5>4, <5>13 DEF P!leader, P!Phase1c
          <5>16. QED
            BY <5>14, <5>15
        <4>5. QED
          BY <4>1, <4>3, <4>4 DEF leader
      <3>3. CASE \E self \in Acceptor : acceptor(self)
        \* Many subcases here
        OMITTED
      <3>4. QED
        BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3 DEF Next
    <2>3. QED
      BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec
input.new_string:
P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA MaxBallotEmpty == MaxBallot({}) = -1
  BY DEF MaxBallot

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW Q \in Quorum
               PROVE  Q # {}
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. PICK S \in ByzQuorum : Q = S \cap Acceptor
    BY DEF Quorum
  <1>2. S \cap S \cap Acceptor # {}
    BY BQA, <1>1
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>2, <1>1

LEMMA QuorumSubsetAcceptor == \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
  BY DEF Quorum
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA InitImpliesPInit == Init => P!Init
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init
               PROVE  P!Init
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. bmsgs = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <1>2. 1bOr2bMsgs = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>3. \A a \in Acceptor : {m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : ma.acc = a}} = {}
    BY <1>2
  <1>4. PmaxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
    BY <1>3, MaxBallotEmpty DEF PmaxBal
  <1>5. msgsOfType("1a") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ msgsOfType("1c") = {}
        /\ msgsOfType("2av") = {} /\ msgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>6. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") = {} /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") = {}
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b") = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType
  <1>7. 1bmsgs = {}
    BY <1>6 DEF 1bmsgs
  <1>8. 1cmsgs = {}
    BY <1>5 DEF 1cmsgs
  <1>9. 2amsgs = {}
    <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value],
                          m \in 2amsgs
                   PROVE  FALSE
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") :
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val
      BY <2>1 DEF 2amsgs
    <2>3. PICK a \in Q : TRUE
      BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <2>4. \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : m2av.acc = a
      BY <2>2, <2>3
    <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>10. msgs = {}
    BY <1>5, <1>7, <1>8, <1>9, <1>6 DEF msgs
  <1>11. None = P!None
    BY DEF None, P!None
  <1>12. maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> P!None]
    BY <1>11 DEF Init
  <1>13. QED
    BY <1>4, <1>10, <1>12 DEF P!Init, Init

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA UnchangedImpliesPUnchanged ==
  ASSUME UNCHANGED vars
  PROVE  P!vars' = P!vars
  <1>1. bmsgs' = bmsgs
    BY DEF vars
  <1>2. knowsSent' = knowsSent
    BY DEF vars
  <1>3. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
    BY DEF vars
  <1>4. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>5. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
    BY <1>4 DEF PmaxBal
  <1>6. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>7. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
    BY <1>1 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType
  <1>8. 1bmsgs' = 1bmsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 1bmsgs, 1bRestrict
  <1>9. 1cmsgs' = 1cmsgs
    BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF 1cmsgs, msgsOfType, KnowsSafeAt
  <1>10. 2amsgs' = 2amsgs
    BY <1>7 DEF 2amsgs
  <1>11. msgs' = msgs
    BY <1>6, <1>8, <1>9, <1>10, <1>7 DEF msgs
  <1>12. QED
    BY <1>5, <1>11, <1>3 DEF P!vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

\* Define an inductive invariant that captures what we need
TypeOK ==
  /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxVVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
  /\ 2avSent \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET [val : Value, bal : Ballot]]
  /\ knowsSent \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET 1bMessage]
  /\ bmsgs \in SUBSET (
       [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballot] \cup
       1bMessage \cup
       [type : {"1c"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] \cup
       2avMessage \cup
       2bMessage)

\* Specific invariants needed for refinement
PmaxBalProp ==
  /\ \A a \in Acceptor : PmaxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
  /\ \A a \in Acceptor : PmaxBal[a] <= maxBal[a]

IndInv == TypeOK /\ PmaxBalProp

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Spec => P!Spec
  <1>1. Init => P!Init
    BY InitImpliesPInit
  <1>2. [Next]_vars => [P!Next]_P!vars
    \* This step requires complex case analysis on Next disjuncts and
    \* showing KnowsSafeAt implies ShowsSafeAt for the 1c case
    \* This proof is non-trivial and requires a substantial inductive invariant
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. QED
    BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, P!Spec

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA MaxBallotEmpty == MaxBallot({}) = -1

  <1>3. maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVVal' = maxVVal
    BY DEF vars
  <1>4. 1bOr2bMsgs' = 1bOr2bMsgs
    BY <1>1 DEF 1bOr2bMsgs
  <1>5. PmaxBal' = PmaxBal
    BY <1>4 DEF PmaxBal
  <1>6. msgsOfType("1a")' = msgsOfType("1a")
    BY <1>1 DEF msgsOfType
  <1>7. acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("1b")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2av")
        /\ acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")' = acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
    BY <1>1 DEF acceptorMsgsOfType, msgsOfType

  <1>12. QED
    BY <1>5, <1>11, <1>3 DEF P!vars
